title: ProtectionStonesMenu
description: Menu addon for protection stones plugin
body:
# ProtectionStonesMenu

Elegant menu addon for **ProtectionStones**

---

## Overview

**ProtectionStonesMenu** is a lightweight addon for **ProtectionStones** that introduces clean and intuitive
menus to manage protection blocks and regions.

Designed to provide a modern, GUI-based experience without relying on complex commands.

---

## Commands

- `/psmenu menu` — Open the region management menu
- `/psmenu reload` — Reload the plugin configuration

---

## Region Management

- Edit region **flags** through interactive menus
- Manage **members** and **owners**
- Rename regions directly from the GUI
- Toggle protection **visibility**
- All changes are applied instantly without commands

---

## Region Moderation

- Integrated **region ban system**
- Kick players from protected regions
- Prevent banned players from entering regions again
- Ideal for private bases, farms, and shared areas

---

## Features

- Modern and minimalistic GUI design
- Fully configurable
- RGB support
- Region ban module
- Region kick module
- Lightweight and performance-friendly
- Seamless integration with ProtectionStones

---

## Requirements

- **[ProtectionStones](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/protectionstones-updated-for-1-20-6.61797/)** installed and enabled
- Spigot or Paper server
